title: Cactus Nerfed
description:
Nerf Cacti by having them 
now also require the blocks N;E;S;W of the block above to be air too.
body:
# Cactus Nerf

Nerf Cactus Tower Farms.
By requiring blocks North, East, West, South of the block above the cactus block to be air for the cactus to grow.

## Performance
This most likely also improves Performance. (Not intensely tested)
